# Sample memory trace
# Format: <R|W> 0x<hex address>

R 0x00001A3C
W 0x00001A40
R 0x00001A44
W 0x00002000
R 0x00003FFC
R 0x00001A3C
R 0x00001A40
W 0x00004000
R 0x00005000
W 0x00006000
R 0x00001A3C
R 0x00002000
W 0x00007000
R 0x00008000
W 0x00009000
R 0x0000A000
R 0x0000B000
W 0x0000C000
R 0x00001A3C
R 0x00002000
